brief: US airstrikes target Iran after soldier deaths and Russia launches major missile attack on Ukraine, while research papers explore AI's impact on writing and human-robot collaboration.
news_summary: Tensions escalate as US and Iran trade fire after two US soldiers killed in Jordan, and Russia strikes Ukrainian cities with ballistic missiles. Meanwhile, extreme weather, political controversies, and the Tate brothers' arrest dominate global headlines.
papers_summary: Studies investigate how ChatGPT revision affects rhetorical moves in personal statements and how human-robot juggling can be planned, alongside analyses of writing processes and multimodal literacy.

en.brief: US airstrikes target Iran after soldier deaths and Russia launches major missile attack on Ukraine, while research papers explore AI's impact on writing and human-robot collaboration.
en.news_summary: Tensions escalate as US and Iran trade fire after two US soldiers killed in Jordan, and Russia strikes Ukrainian cities with ballistic missiles. Meanwhile, extreme weather, political controversies, and the Tate brothers' arrest dominate global headlines.
en.papers_summary: Studies investigate how ChatGPT revision affects rhetorical moves in personal statements and how human-robot juggling can be planned, alongside analyses of writing processes and multimodal literacy.

zh.brief: Today's top stories include: a study on dwarf twins providing cancer clues, the Jieyang dog abuse case sparking global outrage, K-pop spreading in North Korea, European heatwave boosting Chinese air conditioner sales, Mbappe leading World Cup golden boot race, and the first exoplanet in habitable zone with atmosphere found. In research, studies explore AI in writing, human-robot interaction, and narrative visualization.
zh.news_summary: Priority Chinese news covers health discoveries from twin sisters, animal rights protests, cultural infiltration in North Korea, climate-driven market shifts, sports rivalry, and astronomical breakthroughs.
zh.papers_summary: Context papers include studies on professional identities of writing instructors, multimodal meaning in children's writing, noun phrase complexity in L2 English, ChatGPT's impact on writing, and human-robot juggling.

todays_image.caption: The erratic, fluid lines of Meissonnier's rococo ornamentation mirror the unpredictable, shifting course of the marathon runners on drifting sea ice.
todays_image.title: Oeuvre de Juste-Aurèle Meissonnier
